title: Kuma’s Promise to Bonney
description: On pages 2–4, this part focuses on Bonney, Unknown person #1, Kuma, Unknown person #2, Luffy, Kizaru as Kuma’s life, Bonney’s childhood, and the cost of Saturn and the World Government’s cruelty reach their emotional center.
scene: Kuma’s life, Bonney’s childhood, and the cost of Saturn and the World Government’s cruelty reach their emotional center.

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: No doubt about it, Bonney!! Kumachi's here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The girl who keeps pushing forward!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The Bonney Pirates...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Quit CALLING ME BY MY NAME!! I'M THE CAPTAIN, AINT I?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Okay, okay. Captain, then!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It looks like there are marines here too, though...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ALL RIGHT, MEN!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've got orders to bring them in immediately!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...Have arrived!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They say the last city they attacked was packed with injured seniors and even little children!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: They're the worst type of scum!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Arrgh?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A big guy?! Yeah, I've seen 'im!! He was on the outskirts of town!!

dialogue.speaker: Kuma
dialogue.text: I can't see you, Bonney... Please understand.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's hard to believe you became a pirate, of all things...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: but you mustn't chase after me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Where the hell did he go?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've already been dubbed Pirates. We may as well keep searching...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...even if it takes a while, right, captain?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we're gonna take it slow, then I wanna look for Nika too!!

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: Imagine Daddy's face when I tell him...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I found Nika at so-and-so Island!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ...don'tcha think he'd be thrilled?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Meanwhile, in the East Blue...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Alright!! I got a bounty!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Having crushed the vicious fishmen of the Arlong Pirates...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Stiraw had fully $30,000,000

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Straw hat Luffy...

dialogue.speaker: Kizaru
dialogue.text: ...has stepped into the spotlight!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You're going to logustown? What for?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: No particular reason. Who's in charge there?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: That'd be captain smoker.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Jinbe! JinBe! Guess whose kid brother is on this bounty poster!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: A BRAT LIKE THIS TOOK DOWN ARLONG?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: That's right!! He's my kid brother!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What a curious twist of fate, Dragon.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to think your boy would become a pirate...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Here are our ironclad rules of piracy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: PLUNDER WHATEVER YOU WANT!!! (from bad guys!)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ROB THEM BLIND!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: AND DON'T HELP A SOULL!! (unless they really need it!)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Not a scull!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes, that's it! That's EXACTLY HOW YOU PUT ON LIPStICK!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Great!! I'm totally a grown-up now!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I also put this on. Daddy might not even recognize me without something on my cheek!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Next, I just gotta make a name for myself!! That'll get his attention!!

summary: This part advances the Kuma and Bonney Flashback through 46 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
